metadata.title: Forum | AdonERP
metadata.description: Join the Adon ERP community forum. Ask questions, share insights, discuss development, and have a say in the product roadmap. Connect with developers, users, and partners from 180+ countries.

hero.title: discussions
hero.description: The Adon ERP community forum is where developers, users, and partners connect. Ask questions, share insights, and have a say in the product roadmap.

recentThreads.title: How to extend Purchase module with custom fields
Feature request: webhook for stock notifications
v17: multi-currency journal entry best practices

categoriesSection.title: Find the right place to ask
categoriesSection.description: Every topic has a home. Browse categories and jump into the conversation that matters most to you.

categories.title: General Discussion
categories.description: Chat about anything Adon ERP — from quick tips to deep architectural debates.

categories.title: Getting Started
categories.description: New to Adon ERP? Ask setup questions, browse tutorials, and connect with mentors.

categories.title: Development & API
categories.description: Dive into the codebase, discuss API endpoints, and share integration patterns.

categories.title: Feature Requests
categories.description: Propose new features, vote on what the community wants next, and shape the roadmap.

categories.title: Bug Reports
categories.description: Found something unexpected? File a bug report here and get triage from the team.

categories.title: Ideas & Show & Tell
categories.description: Share what you have built, demo your modules, and inspire the next contributor.

whyForumSection.title: Built for answers, not noise
whyForumSection.description: Reddit-style chaos has no place here. Our forum is curated, voted, and moderated — so the good stuff rises to the top.

features.title: Search everything
features.description: Full-text search across all threads, replies, and attachments — find the answer before you ask.

features.title: Vote on answers
features.description: Upvote helpful replies so the best solution rises to the top. Accepted answers get a green check.

features.title: Community-led support
features.description: Active contributors and maintainers answer questions daily. Average first response is under 2 hours.

features.title: Trending topics
features.description: Hot threads are surfaced on the home page so you never miss a topic the community is buzzing about.

recentThreadsSection.title: Hot threads from this week
recentThreadsSection.description: Catch up on what the community is talking about right now.

contributorsSection.title: Our top forum contributors
contributorsSection.description: Members who consistently help others, welcome newcomers, and keep the conversation constructive.

guidelinesSection.title: Keep it welcoming
guidelinesSection.description: A great community starts with great behaviour. Follow these simple rules and help us keep Adon ERP a safe, inclusive place.

rules.title: Be respectful
rules.description: Treat every member with kindness. Constructive debate is welcome; personal attacks are not.

rules.title: Search before posting
rules.description: Chances are someone has already asked your question. A quick search saves everyone time.

rules.title: Stay on topic
rules.description: Keep discussions relevant to Adon ERP. Off-topic posts dilute the signal for everyone.

rules.title: Match the tone
rules.description: Jargon-free when helping beginners. Detailed and precise when discussing maintainer-level topics.

testimonials.quote: I asked a question about custom reports at 9 pm and had three excellent answers before I went to bed. This forum is genuinely the best developer community I have joined.
testimonials.name: Julia Saab

testimonials.quote: The search is so good that I rarely even need to post. Being able to upvote the right answer means the next person with the same problem gets instant help.
testimonials.name: Kwame Osei

ctaSection.title: Ready to join the conversation?
ctaSection.description: Whether you are here to ask, answer, or just lurk — the Adon ERP community forum welcomes you.
ctaSection.footerText: Free & open to everyone · No spam · Community-moderated
